query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A person peers through a square opening in a blue mat, facing the camera with eyes opened wide. Horizontal and vertical teal stripes mark the forehead, cheeks, nose, neck, and shoulders. The individual wears a thin chain necklace. Warm orange and reddish tones fill the space inside the cutout behind and around the figure.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person peers through a square opening in a blue mat with eyes wide, communicating alarm or distress. An aggressive orange-yellow sickly cast suffuses the skin with an unnatural warmth, while clashing teal stripes slash across the face and throat in jarring color disharmony. The overall atmosphere evokes unease and tension through the combination of the fearful subject and unsettling palette.
